name: Tee'd up indoor Golf
address: 149 Cox Crk Pkwy S Suite C, Florence, AL 35630
about: Tee'd Up Florence is an indoor golf simulation facility featuring 7 bays equipped with the newest PGA Tour proven technology. The venue offers high-level projection and screen image quality with immersive 4k graphics, along with detailed club and ball data for swing improvement. Pricing is bay-based, with rates of $32 per hour for weekday afternoons and $44 for evenings and weekends. It is open 7 days a week and allows for both online booking and walk-ins on availability.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium PGA Tour proven simulator technology with detailed club and ball data feedback
Flexible booking with both online reservations and walk-in options available
On-site professional instruction available for swing improvement
Designed for groups with a maximum of 6 people per bay
Vibrant leagues and events for competitive and social play

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is allowed from nearby restaurants, but no kitchen on-site.
Beer, wine coolers, and non-alcoholic beverages available for purchase.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium PGA Tour proven equipment mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides the necessary golf equipment, so you don't need to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: You can bring food from external locations, but outside drinks are not allowed. The venue offers beer, wine coolers, sodas, water, and sports drinks for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and pace of play. Specific timing is not provided, but it's standard simulator golf duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is not explicitly marketed as kid-friendly and focuses more on adult golfers and leagues.
